readme.purpose: Annual withdrawal targets from portfolio. Actual withdrawals may be scaled down in bad markets per economicglobal.json withdrawal shock settings.
readme.floor_k: Minimum withdrawal in $k regardless of market conditions. Simulator will not scale below this even in severe downturns.

schedule.years: Year range e.g. '1-5'. Simulation year 1 = current_age + 1.
schedule.amount_k: Target withdrawal in $k for this period (nominal). This is the ask; market scaling may reduce it.
schedule.base_k: Inflation base in $k. Each year the floor and target grow from this base by the inflation rate. Set equal to floor_k if you want floor to inflate with target.
